aboutSeoDescription: [AR] Strideto is Pakistan's student-first portal for jobs, scholarships, admissions, and internships.
aboutIntro: [AR] Strideto is Pakistan's leading e-portal built for students and young professionals. Our mission is to connect you with jobs, scholarships, admissions, and internships—all in one place.
aboutMissionBody: [AR] We help Pakistani students find verified opportunities: government and private jobs, local and international scholarships, university admissions, and internships. We believe every student deserves access to clear, updated information to plan their career and education.
aboutOffer1: [AR] Curated job listings from PPSC, FPSC, NTS, and private employers
aboutOffer2: [AR] Scholarships in Pakistan and abroad (Turkey, China, Germany, UK, and more)
aboutOffer5: [AR] Resume builder, career guidance, and student alerts
aboutStudentsBody: [AR] Strideto is designed with students in mind—mobile-friendly, easy to search, and updated regularly. We partner with institutions and employers to bring you real opportunities and help reduce information gaps in the education-to-employment journey.
privacySeoDescription: [AR] Strideto privacy policy: how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacyIntroBody: [AR] Strideto (“we”, “our”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and disclose information when you use our platform for jobs, scholarships, admissions, and internships.
privacyCollectBody: [AR] We collect information you provide when registering (name, email, password), when you save listings or apply to jobs (resume, application data), and when you subscribe to our newsletter. We also collect usage data such as pages visited and search queries to improve the service.
privacyUseBody: [AR] We use your information to operate the platform, personalize recommendations, send you alerts you have opted into, process job applications, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacySecurityBody: [AR] We use industry-standard measures to protect your data, including encryption and secure storage. Passwords are hashed; we do not store plain-text passwords.
privacyThirdPartyBody: [AR] We may use third-party services such as Google Analytics and Google AdSense to understand site usage and display relevant advertisements. These partners may use cookies and similar technologies. You can manage ad personalization via our cookie banner and your browser settings. For Google's ad policies, see
privacyRightsBody: [AR] You may access, correct, or delete your account data through your profile settings. You can unsubscribe from emails at any time. For requests or questions, contact us.
termsSeoDescription: [AR] Strideto terms of service for using the jobs, scholarships, and admissions platform.
termsAcceptBody: [AR] By using Strideto, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform. We may update these terms from time to time; continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
termsUseBody: [AR] Strideto provides a portal for discovering jobs, scholarships, admissions, and internships. You may use the platform for personal, non-commercial use. You must not scrape, copy, or misuse content without permission. You are responsible for the accuracy of information you submit (e.g. applications, resume).
termsAccountBody: [AR] You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You must notify us of any unauthorized use. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or are used for fraud or abuse.
termsListingsBody: [AR] Listings are aggregated from various sources. We strive for accuracy but do not guarantee the completeness or timeliness of every listing. When you apply via external links (e.g. PPSC, university portals), your interaction is with that third party and their terms apply.
termsLiabilityBody: [AR] Strideto is provided “as is”. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of the platform or reliance on listings. You use external apply links and third-party sites at your own risk.
cookiesSeoDescription: [AR] How Strideto uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookiesWhatBody: [AR] Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences, keep you logged in, and understand how the site is used.
cookiesHowBody: [AR] Strideto uses cookies to: (1) keep you signed in to your account, (2) remember your language and theme preferences, (3) measure site performance and analytics, and (4) support security (e.g. rate limiting). With your consent, we may also use advertising cookies (e.g. Google AdSense) to show relevant ads and support free student services.
cookiesChoicesBody: [AR] You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect login and preferences. For more on how we handle data, see our
faqSeoDescription: [AR] Frequently asked questions about using Strideto for jobs, scholarships, and admissions.
faqIntro: [AR] Quick answers to common questions about Strideto and how to make the most of the platform.
faqA1: [AR] Yes. Browsing jobs, scholarships, and admissions is free. Creating an account to save listings and apply is also free.
faqQ2: [AR] Do I need an account to apply for jobs?
faqA2: [AR] For jobs that allow internal application on Strideto, you need an account. For external links (e.g. PPSC, FPSC), you can follow the link without an account.
faqA3: [AR] We update listings regularly. Jobs from our automated scrapers run every 6 hours; manually added listings appear as soon as they are published.
faqQ4: [AR] How do I get scholarship or job alerts?
faqA4: [AR] Subscribe to our email newsletter from the footer or homepage. You can choose daily or weekly digests. Telegram and WhatsApp alerts are also available.
faqQ5: [AR] Can I submit a job or scholarship opportunity?
faqA5: [AR] Yes. Use our Submit Opportunity page to suggest a listing. Our team will review and add it if it meets our guidelines.
faqQ6: [AR] How do I report an error or inappropriate content?
faqA6: [AR] Use the Report Issue link in the footer or contact us with the listing URL and description. We take reports seriously and will act accordingly.
helpSeoDescription: [AR] Get help using Strideto: how to search jobs, save listings, apply, and manage your account.
helpIntro: [AR] Find answers and guidance on using Strideto to search for jobs, scholarships, admissions, and internships.
helpGettingStartedBody: [AR] You can browse jobs, scholarships, and admissions without an account. Create a free account to save listings, get personalized recommendations, apply to jobs within the portal, and receive alerts.
helpSearchBody: [AR] Use the search bar on the homepage or listing pages. Filter by province, city, job type (government/private/internship), deadline, and category to narrow results.
helpApplyBody: [AR] Some jobs allow you to apply directly on Strideto (upload resume and submit). Others redirect you to the official website (e.g. PPSC, FPSC). Always check the job detail page for the correct apply link.
contactSeoDescription: [AR] Contact Strideto for support, partnerships, or to submit opportunities.
contactIntro: [AR] Get in touch for support, advertising, or to submit a job or scholarship opportunity. We aim to respond within 1–2 business days.
contactEmailBody: [AR] For general inquiries, report an issue, submit an opportunity, or advertise with us, email the address above with a clear subject line.
contactSocialPrefix: [AR] You can also reach us via
disclaimerDescription: [AR] Strideto disclaimer regarding listing accuracy, third-party links, and liability.
disclaimerIntroBody: [AR] Strideto provides aggregated listings for jobs, scholarships, admissions, and internships. Content is for general information only and does not constitute professional, legal, or financial advice.
disclaimerAccuracyBody: [AR] We strive to keep listings accurate and up to date but cannot guarantee completeness. Deadlines, eligibility, and requirements may change without notice. Always verify on the official source before applying.
disclaimerThirdPartyBody: [AR] Many listings link to external websites (government portals, universities, employers). Strideto is not responsible for content, availability, or policies on third-party sites.
disclaimerLiabilityBody: [AR] Use of Strideto is at your own risk. We are not liable for losses arising from reliance on listings, failed applications, or third-party interactions.
refundDescription: [AR] Refund policy for paid employer services on Strideto.
refundIntroBody: [AR] Strideto is free for students. Paid services apply primarily to employer job postings and promotions. This policy explains when refunds may be issued.
refundEmployerBody: [AR] If a paid job listing fails to activate due to a technical error on our side, contact us within 7 days for a refund or credit. Listings removed for policy violations are not eligible for refund.
refundStudentBody: [AR] Core student features (browsing, saving, applying, resume builder) are free. No refunds apply to free services.
refundProcessBody: [AR] Email support@strideto.com with your payment reference, employer account email, and reason. We respond within 5 business days.
careersDescription: [AR] Join the Strideto team. Open roles in Pakistan for education and technology.
careersIntroBody: [AR] Strideto helps millions of Pakistani students find opportunities. We are a small, mission-driven team building tools for education and employment access.
careersCultureBody: [AR] We value student-first thinking, transparency, remote-friendly collaboration, and impact over hype.
careersOpenBody: [AR] We hire periodically for the following areas. Send your CV even if a role is not listed—we keep strong applications on file.
careersApplySuffix: [AR] with your CV and a short note on why you want to join Strideto.
supportDescription: [AR] Get help with your Strideto account, listings, and applications.
supportIntroBody: [AR] Our support team assists students and employers with account issues, listing questions, and technical problems.
supportResponseBody: [AR] We aim to respond within 1–2 business days. Urgent employer billing issues are prioritized.
foreignStudiesDescription: [AR] Study abroad opportunities for Pakistani students.
foreignStudiesIntro: [AR] Explore study abroad programs, country guides, and international scholarship links.
foreignStudiesComingSoon: [AR] Country-wise guides and scholarship links are being expanded. Browse International Scholarships in the meantime.
schoolsDescription: [AR] Schools and colleges in Pakistan for admissions and programs.
schoolsIntro: [AR] Find schools, colleges, and intermediate programs across Pakistan.
schoolsComingSoon: [AR] Institution directory is being expanded. Browse Admissions for current university and college openings.

licenseFooterNote: [AR] Strideto is a student-first platform for jobs, scholarships, and education in Pakistan. The source code is available under the MIT License. See also our
advertiseDescription: [AR] Reach students and job seekers across Pakistan. Advertise jobs, courses, or services on Strideto.
advertiseIntro: [AR] Strideto reaches thousands of students and job seekers across Pakistan. Partner with us to promote your vacancies, courses, or services to an engaged audience.
advertiseWhy1: [AR] Targeted audience: students, graduates, and young professionals
advertiseWhy2: [AR] Nationwide reach with strong traffic from major cities
advertiseWhy3: [AR] Featured job and scholarship listings for higher visibility
advertiseWhy4: [AR] Flexible packages for employers, universities, and training providers
advertisePromoteBody: [AR] Job openings, internship programs, scholarship programs, university admissions, short courses, webinars, and education-related services.
advertiseContactBody: [AR] For advertising inquiries, partnership opportunities, or to post a job, please contact us. We'll respond within 1–2 business days.
servicesDescription: [AR] Explore Strideto services: jobs, scholarships, admissions, internships, resume builder, and career resources.
servicesIntro: [AR] Strideto offers a range of free services to help Pakistani students find jobs, scholarships, admissions, and internships. All designed to support your education and career journey.
serviceJobsDesc: [AR] Browse government and private sector jobs across Pakistan. Filter by province, category, and deadline.
serviceScholarshipsDesc: [AR] Discover local and international scholarships—fully funded and partial—for undergraduate and graduate studies.
serviceAdmissionsDesc: [AR] Stay updated on university admissions, entry tests, and application deadlines.
serviceInternshipsDesc: [AR] Find internships and training opportunities to build experience while studying.
serviceResumeDesc: [AR] Create and download your CV with our simple resume builder.
serviceCareerDesc: [AR] Articles and tips on career paths, interviews, and job preparation.
serviceExamDesc: [AR] Resources for FPSC, PPSC, NTS, CSS, and other competitive exams.
serviceAlertsDesc: [AR] Subscribe to email or Telegram alerts for new jobs and scholarship deadlines.
submitOpportunityDescription: [AR] Submit a job, scholarship, or admission opportunity to Strideto for review.
submitOpportunityIntro: [AR] Have a job, scholarship, or admission opportunity that would help Pakistani students? Submit it here and our team will review and consider adding it to Strideto.
submitNeedBody: [AR] Please provide: title, organization name, location (if applicable), deadline or last date, official application link, and a short description. Submissions must be genuine and publicly verifiable.
submitHowBody: [AR] Send the details to us via our Contact page. Use the subject line "Submit Opportunity" and include all relevant links. We review submissions within a few business days and will add approved listings to the portal.
noAccessPage: [AR] You don't have access to this page.
